podcast_subtitle: Good news from the bush, the boat and the bar-mouth
podcast_description: A light, good-news morning bulletin for Watty and the family in Bees Creek, NT. Recreational fishing and outdoors news from the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out. Built for the school run.
